# M3M × Jacob & Co Residences

## Project
- Name: M3M × Jacob & Co Residences
- Alternate names: M3M Jacob Co Residences, M3M Jewel Crest Residences
- Developer: M3M India in partnership with Jacob & Co (Swiss haute horology, founded 1986)
- On-ground development partner: 10x Infra (Proprietor: Tarun Dua)
- Location: Sector 97, Noida Expressway, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Project area: ~5.8 acres
- Total apartments: ~250 branded residences
- Asset type: Residential ONLY (ultra-luxury branded residences)

## RERA
- Main: UPRERAPRJ690055/10/2025 (granted October 2025 by UP RERA)
- Residential component: UPRERAPRJ683201
- Verify on the UP RERA portal: up-rera.in

## Configurations and sizes
- 3 BHK "Opera": 2,500 sq ft
- 4 BHK "Billionaire": 4,535 sq ft
- 5 BHK "Palatial": 6,400+ sq ft (largest residence at the address)

## Pricing
- Starting price: ₹8 Crore onwards (3 BHK Opera)
- Price range: ₹10 Crore to ₹50 Crore
- Per square foot: approximately ₹10,000 to ₹14,000

## Payment plan
50:50 — 50% at booking, 50% at possession (December 2028).

## Possession
December 2028.

## Signature amenities (75+ total)
Maybach chauffeur service, 50,000 sq ft signature clubhouse, private sky lounges, 24/7 butler service, Italian marble finishes, VRV air conditioning, temperature-controlled indoor pool, triple-height marble lobby, concierge desk, biometric security, multi-level secure parking, gymnasium with personal trainer suite, spa & wellness centre, yoga & meditation pavilion, squash & tennis courts, indoor games & billiards, private cinema screening room, wine cellar & cigar lounge, library, art gallery, banquet & private dining, co-working business centre, children's play zone, jogging & cycling track, landscaped sky gardens, outdoor amphitheatre, pet park & pet spa, EV charging stations, 24/7 manned security, smart-home automation, high-speed elevators with destination control.

## Specifications
- Lobby: Triple-height with Italian marble walls
- Flooring: Imported Italian marble in living and dining
- HVAC: VRV climate-control system in every room
- Pool: Temperature-controlled indoor swimming pool
- Lifts: High-speed destination-control elevators
- Security: Biometric access, 24/7 manned, CCTV with AI analytics
- Concierge: 24/7 butler service in residence
- Transport: Maybach chauffeur service from porte-cochère

## Location and connectivity
- Amity University: ~7 minutes
- Yatharth Hospital: ~9 minutes
- Gardens Galleria: ~12 minutes
- DLF Mall of India: ~15 minutes
- Sector 18 schools: ~15 minutes
- Noida City Center: ~20 minutes
- Jewar International Airport: ~30–40 minutes via Noida Expressway
- IGI Airport, Delhi: ~45 minutes via DND Flyway

## Developer background
M3M India is one of the largest real-estate developers in Delhi NCR, founded in 2010 by the Bansal family (Basant, Roop and Pankaj Bansal). The portfolio spans ultra-luxury residences and landmark commercial projects across Gurugram and Noida. Jacob & Co is a Swiss haute horology house founded in 1986 by Jacob Arabo, known for some of the most complicated timepieces in the world (Astronomia, Bugatti Chiron Tourbillon, Twin Turbo Furious). The Noida partnership is the first Jacob & Co branded residences in India and one of only a handful of haute horology branded residences globally.

- Sales phone: +91 94122 34688
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919412234688
- Site URL: https://jewelcrestnoida.com/

## Important disclosures
- This website is operated by an authorized channel partner of M3M India, not by M3M India directly.
- The phone number +91-94122-34688 is a channel-partner contact.
- M3M × Jacob & Co Residences is a residential project. The commercial retail block at the same Sector 97 development is sold separately as M3M Jewel Crest Avenue.
- All information is indicative and subject to change. Buyers must independently verify all details on the UP RERA portal at up-rera.in before making any purchase decision.
- No assured returns are offered or implied.
